forecast-period.text: Sunny. Winds north to northeasterly 20 to 30 km/h. Daytime maximum temperatures in the mid to high 20s.
High
Sun protection 9:50am to 2:30pm, UV Index predicted to reach 5 [Moderate]
Mostly sunny. Winds north to northeasterly 20 to 30 km/h. Overnight temperatures falling to between 14 and 17 with daytime temperatures reaching the mid to high 20s.

Mostly sunny morning. High chance of showers in the afternoon and evening. Winds northerly 15 to 25 km/h increasing to 30 km/h before turning westerly 15 to 20 km/h during the afternoon. Overnight temperatures falling to around 15 with daytime temperatures reaching the mid to high 20s.

Partly cloudy. Medium chance of showers, most likely in the morning. Winds west to southwesterly 15 to 20 km/h turning south to southeasterly during the afternoon. Overnight temperatures falling to around 12 with daytime temperatures reaching around 20.
Sunny. Winds northerly 15 to 25 km/h turning northeasterly in the evening. Daytime maximum temperatures around 30.
Moderate
Sun protection 10:00am to 2:30pm, UV Index predicted to reach 5 [Moderate]
Mostly sunny. Winds north to northeasterly 15 to 25 km/h. Overnight temperatures falling to between 13 and 17 with daytime temperatures reaching the mid to high 20s.

Mostly sunny morning. High chance of showers in the afternoon and evening. Winds northerly 20 to 30 km/h increasing to 35 km/h before shifting west to southwesterly 15 to 25 km/h during the afternoon. Overnight temperatures falling to around 15 with daytime temperatures reaching the mid to high 20s.

Medium chance of showers, most likely in the morning. Mostly sunny afternoon. Winds southwesterly 15 to 25 km/h turning south to southeasterly 15 to 20 km/h during the afternoon. Overnight temperatures falling to around 12 with daytime temperatures reaching the low 20s.
Sunny. Winds northerly 15 to 25 km/h. Daytime maximum temperatures in the mid to high 20s.
Moderate
Sun protection 10:10am to 2:20pm, UV Index predicted to reach 4 [Moderate]
Mostly sunny. Winds northerly 20 to 30 km/h. Overnight temperatures falling to around 16 with daytime temperatures reaching the low to mid 20s.

Partly cloudy. Very high chance of showers, most likely in the afternoon and evening. Winds northerly 15 to 25 km/h turning westerly 15 to 20 km/h during the afternoon. Overnight temperatures falling to around 15 with daytime temperatures reaching the low to mid 20s.

Partly cloudy. Medium chance of showers, most likely in the morning. Winds southwesterly 15 to 20 km/h turning southerly 15 to 25 km/h during the day. Overnight temperatures falling to around 11 with daytime temperatures reaching around 20.
Sunny. Winds north to northeasterly 15 to 25 km/h. Daytime maximum temperatures in the high 20s.
Moderate
Sun protection 10:00am to 2:10pm, UV Index predicted to reach 4 [Moderate]

Mostly sunny. Winds northeasterly 15 to 20 km/h becoming light before dawn then becoming north to northeasterly 20 to 30 km/h in the morning. Overnight temperatures falling to around 11 with daytime temperatures reaching the mid to high 20s.

Mostly sunny morning. Medium chance of showers in the evening. Winds northerly 20 to 30 km/h shifting west to southwesterly 15 to 20 km/h during the afternoon. Overnight temperatures falling to around 14 with daytime temperatures reaching the high 20s.

Medium chance of showers, most likely in the morning. Mostly sunny afternoon. Light winds becoming west to southwesterly 15 to 20 km/h during the morning then tending south to southwesterly during the afternoon. Overnight temperatures falling to around 11 with daytime temperatures reaching the low 20s.
Sunny. Winds north to northeasterly 15 to 25 km/h. Daytime maximum temperatures in the high 20s.
Moderate
Sun protection 10:10am to 2:00pm, UV Index predicted to reach 4 [Moderate]

Mostly sunny. Winds north to northeasterly 25 to 35 km/h decreasing to 15 to 25 km/h in the middle of the day. Overnight temperatures falling to between 10 and 14 with daytime temperatures reaching the mid to high 20s.

Mostly sunny morning. Medium chance of showers in the afternoon and evening. Winds northerly 20 to 30 km/h tending northwesterly 15 to 25 km/h during the day then becoming light during the evening. Overnight temperatures falling to around 14 with daytime temperatures reaching the mid to high 20s.

Partly cloudy. Medium chance of showers, most likely in the morning. Light winds becoming southwesterly 15 to 20 km/h during the morning then becoming light during the evening. Overnight temperatures falling to around 11 with daytime temperatures reaching the low 20s.
Sunny. Winds northeasterly 15 to 20 km/h becoming light in the evening. Daytime maximum temperatures in the high 20s.
No Rating
Sun protection 9:50am to 2:20pm, UV Index predicted to reach 5 [Moderate]

Mostly sunny. Light winds becoming north to northeasterly 15 to 20 km/h in the morning then becoming light in the evening. Overnight temperatures falling to around 8 with daytime temperatures reaching the high 20s.

Mostly sunny. Slight chance of a shower in the west in the evening. Near zero chance of rain elsewhere. Winds north to northeasterly 15 to 20 km/h tending north to northwesterly 20 to 30 km/h during the morning then becoming light during the evening. Overnight temperatures falling to around 12 with daytime temperatures reaching the low 30s.

Medium chance of showers, most likely in the morning. Mostly sunny afternoon. Light winds becoming southwesterly 15 to 20 km/h during the morning then tending southerly during the afternoon. Overnight temperatures falling to around 13 with daytime temperatures reaching the low to mid 20s.
Sunny. Winds northeasterly 15 to 25 km/h. Daytime maximum temperatures in the high 20s.
Moderate
Sun protection 10:00am to 2:20pm, UV Index predicted to reach 5 [Moderate]

Mostly sunny. Winds northeasterly 15 to 20 km/h becoming light before dawn then becoming north to northeasterly 15 to 25 km/h in the morning. Overnight temperatures falling to between 9 and 12 with daytime temperatures reaching the mid to high 20s.

Mostly sunny. Medium chance of showers in the southwest, slight chance elsewhere. Winds northeasterly 15 to 20 km/h tending northerly 20 to 30 km/h during the morning then becoming light during the evening. Overnight temperatures falling to around 13 with daytime temperatures reaching around 30.

Medium chance of showers, most likely in the morning. Mostly sunny afternoon. Winds west to southwesterly 15 to 20 km/h tending south to southwesterly during the day. Overnight temperatures falling to around 12 with daytime temperatures reaching the low 20s.
Sunny. Winds northeasterly 15 to 25 km/h. Daytime maximum temperatures 25 to 31.
Moderate
Sun protection 9:50am to 2:40pm, UV Index predicted to reach 5 [Moderate]
Mostly sunny. Winds north to northeasterly 15 to 25 km/h. Overnight temperatures falling to between 9 and 14 with daytime temperatures reaching 24 to 29.

Mostly sunny morning. Medium chance of showers in the evening. Winds northerly 20 to 30 km/h tending northwesterly during the day then becoming light during the evening. Overnight temperatures falling to between 11 and 16 with daytime temperatures reaching around 30.

Medium chance of showers, most likely in the morning. Mostly sunny afternoon. Light winds becoming south to southwesterly 15 to 25 km/h during the morning then becoming light during the evening. Overnight temperatures falling to between 10 and 13 with daytime temperatures reaching the low 20s.
Sunny. Winds east to northeasterly 15 to 25 km/h. Daytime maximum temperatures 23 to 29.
No Rating
Sun protection 9:50am to 2:50pm, UV Index predicted to reach 5 [Moderate]
Mostly sunny. Winds east to northeasterly 15 to 25 km/h. Overnight temperatures falling to between 8 and 14 with daytime temperatures reaching 24 to 29.

Partly cloudy. Slight chance of a shower near the coast in the evening. Near zero chance of rain elsewhere. Winds northeasterly 15 to 25 km/h turning northwesterly 20 to 30 km/h during the afternoon. Overnight temperatures falling to between 10 and 16 with daytime temperatures reaching around 30.

Mostly sunny. Slight chance of a shower south of Hawker in the morning. Near zero chance of rain elsewhere. Winds south to southwesterly 15 to 25 km/h tending south to southeasterly 15 to 20 km/h during the evening. Overnight temperatures falling to between 10 and 15 with daytime temperatures reaching the low to mid 20s.
Mostly sunny. Winds north to northeasterly 25 to 40 km/h. Daytime maximum temperatures in the low to mid 30s.
High
Sun protection 10:00am to 3:00pm, UV Index predicted to reach 6 [High]
Mostly sunny. Winds north to northeasterly 25 to 40 km/h. Overnight temperatures falling to between 16 and 19 with daytime temperatures reaching 29 to 35.

Partly cloudy. High chance of showers south of Streaky Bay, medium chance elsewhere. Winds northerly 15 to 25 km/h tending northwesterly 20 to 25 km/h during the morning then tending southeast to southwesterly 15 to 25 km/h during the day. Overnight temperatures falling to around 16 with daytime temperatures reaching 24 to 29.

Partly cloudy. Slight chance of a shower south of Streaky Bay in the morning. Near zero chance of rain elsewhere. Light winds becoming southerly 20 to 30 km/h during the morning then becoming light during the evening. Overnight temperatures falling to around 12 with daytime temperatures reaching the low to mid 20s.
Sunny. Winds north to northeasterly 15 to 25 km/h. Daytime maximum temperatures around 30.
Moderate
Sun protection 9:50am to 2:40pm, UV Index predicted to reach 5 [Moderate]

Mostly sunny. Winds northerly 20 to 30 km/h becoming light in the evening then becoming north to northeasterly 15 to 20 km/h in the late evening. Overnight temperatures falling to between 13 and 17 with daytime temperatures reaching the high 20s.

Becoming cloudy. High chance of showers in the south, medium chance elsewhere. Winds northerly 20 to 30 km/h shifting west to southwesterly 15 to 25 km/h during the afternoon. Overnight temperatures falling to around 15 with daytime temperatures reaching around 30.

Partly cloudy. Slight chance of a shower, most likely in the morning. Winds southwesterly 15 to 20 km/h turning southerly 20 to 30 km/h during the morning. Overnight temperatures falling to around 12 with daytime temperatures reaching the low 20s.
Mostly sunny. Winds north to northeasterly 15 to 25 km/h. Daytime maximum temperatures in the low 30s.
Moderate
Sun protection 10:10am to 2:40pm, UV Index predicted to reach 5 [Moderate]
Mostly sunny. Winds northerly 20 to 30 km/h. Overnight temperatures falling to around 17 with daytime temperatures reaching around 30.

Partly cloudy. High chance of showers, most likely in the afternoon and evening. Winds northerly 15 to 25 km/h turning westerly 20 to 30 km/h during the day. Overnight temperatures falling to around 16 with daytime temperatures reaching the mid to high 20s.

Partly cloudy. Slight chance of a shower, most likely in the morning. Winds southwesterly 15 to 20 km/h tending southerly 15 to 25 km/h during the morning then becoming light during the evening. Overnight temperatures falling to between 9 and 12 with daytime temperatures reaching the low 20s.
Sunny. Winds northeasterly 25 to 35 km/h. Daytime maximum temperatures in the low to mid 30s.
Moderate
Sun protection 9:40am to 3:10pm, UV Index predicted to reach 7 [High]
Mostly sunny. Winds northeasterly 25 to 35 km/h. Overnight temperatures falling to between 12 and 19 with daytime temperatures reaching 29 to 35.

Partly cloudy. Slight chance of a shower south of Woomera in the afternoon and evening. Near zero chance of rain elsewhere. Winds north to northeasterly 15 to 25 km/h tending north to northwesterly during the day then tending southeast to southwesterly 15 to 20 km/h during the evening. Overnight temperatures falling to between 13 and 19 with daytime temperatures reaching around 30.
Mostly sunny. Winds south to southeasterly 15 to 25 km/h. Overnight temperatures falling to around 13 with daytime temperatures reaching 24 to 30.
Sunny. Winds east to southeasterly 20 to 30 km/h decreasing to 15 to 20 km/h in the evening. Daytime maximum temperatures around 30.
Moderate
Sun protection 9:30am to 2:50pm, UV Index predicted to reach 6 [High]

Sunny. Winds east to southeasterly 15 to 20 km/h tending east to northeasterly 20 to 30 km/h during the morning. Overnight temperatures falling to between 10 and 15 with daytime temperatures reaching around 30.

Mostly sunny. Winds east to northeasterly 20 to 30 km/h tending northwest to northeasterly during the day then becoming light during the evening. Overnight temperatures falling to between 13 and 16 with daytime temperatures reaching around 30.

Mostly sunny. Medium chance of showers south of Yunta, most likely in the morning. Near zero chance of rain elsewhere. The chance of a thunderstorm south of Leigh Creek in the morning. Light winds becoming south to southwesterly 15 to 25 km/h during the morning then tending south to southeasterly during the afternoon. Overnight temperatures falling to between 13 and 16 with daytime temperatures reaching 24 to 31.
